list.name: project
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT project FROM sessions ORDER BY project

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.project, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY s.project ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT date_trunc('day', m.timestamp) AS time, s.project, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT s.project, COUNT(DISTINCT s.session_id) AS sessions, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS total_tokens, MIN(s.started_at) AS first_session, MAX(s.started_at) AS last_session FROM sessions s JOIN messages m ON m.session_id = s.session_id JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE s.started_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND s.is_subagent = false GROUP BY s.project ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
